startup_time_ms.note: Cold start = first invocation; warm = OS file cache populated

getbalance.note: Slow due to UTXO chain scan — O(n_blocks)

getbestblockhash.note: Mining loop blocks RPC handler thread

getmininginfo.note: Highest latency — contends for mining state

regtest.note: Both 30s and 15s sample windows crashed node mid-bench (segfault). Block production rate could not be measured under sustained RPC load.

stability_issues.trigger: Sustained RPC load (100+ sequential calls per method) while mining active
stability_issues.impact: Block production measurement impossible under bench load
stability_issues.recommendation: Investigate Thread.zig segfault — likely race/UAF in RPC handler thread spawn or mempool/blockchain shared state

observations: RPC latency varies 33x between methods (62ms vs 2090ms) — mining loop blocks RPC thread under load
Startup 645ms warm (1849ms cold) — second invocation benefits from OS file cache
Node crashed twice with segfault during sustained RPC load — Thread.zig:509 frame in stack trace
DB user mainnet (omnibus-chain.dat, 140 blocks) NOT touched — regtest used data/regtest/chain.dat
100 vs 20 samples cross-validated — RPC latency numbers are stable (variance <2%)
